string.name: inject_to_head_default
string.value:
<style>
    
html, body {
    
/*
    
font-family: sans-serif-condensed;
    
font-size: 80%;
    
*/
    
}
    
</style>
    

    
<script type="text/javascript">
    
function onPageLoaded() {
    
/*
    
if ('{{ post.text_converter_name }}' == 'MarkdownTextConverter') {
    
  window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);
    
}
    
*/
    
}
    
</script>

string.name: do_you_really_want_to_delete_this_witharg
string.value: Do you really want to delete this %s?

string.name: enter_name_of_folder
string.value: Enter the name of your folder

string.name: file_folder_already_exists_please_use_a_different_name
string.value: File/folder already exists! Please use a different name

string.name: open_existing_files_in_view_mode
string.value: Open existing files in view mode

string.name: hide_statusbar_at_this_view
string.value: Hide the status bar in this view

string.name: language_change_restart_description
string.value: Change language of this app. Restart app for changes to take effect

string.name: storage_permission_required
string.value: Storage permission required to read and write files

string.name: document_to_be_loaded_and_saved_as_witharg
string.value: Document to be loaded and saved as "%s"

string.name: save_or_not
string.value: Do you want to save the changes you made?

string.name: reload_or_not
string.value: Do you want to abandon the changes and reload?

string.name: tried_to_create_shortcut_for_this_notice
string.value: Tried to create a shortcut to your home screen. Note that some launchers may not support this.

string.name: file_not_in_save_path_do_import_notice__appspecific
string.value: The selected file is not located in the app's notebook directory. Do you want to copy it to the current folder? This will overwrite any existing file with the same name.

string.name: file_not_in_current_folder_do_copy__appspecific
string.value: The file is not located in the current folder. Do you want to copy it to the current folder? This will overwrite any existing file with the same name.

string.name: remember_last_folder_location_on_startup
string.value: Remember last folder location on startup

string.name: overall_theme_used_in_app
string.value: The overall theme used in the app

string.name: highlighting_delay_lower_value_more_battery_drain_description__appspecific
string.value: Delay in milliseconds for highlighting refresh. A lower value will start highlighting earlier, but it will drain your battery and may slow down the app on older devices.

string.name: highlighting_enabled_or_not__appspecific
string.value: Control whether entered text should be highlighted or not

string.name: control_font_size_in_editor
string.value: Control the font size used in the editor

string.name: textactions_show_useful_actions_description__appspecific
string.value: Show a bar with handy buttons on bottom. These text actions modify the text or run an action based on the text.

string.name: load_last_opened_folder_at_startup
string.value: Load the last opened folder at startup

string.name: underline_hex_color_wether_or_not_to_description__appspecific
string.value: Whether to underline hex color codes according to color

string.name: insert_current_date_when_starting_new_task
string.value: Insert the current date when starting a new task

string.name: append_contexts_and_projects_on_end_of_task
string.value: Append contexts and projects at the end of a task when using the appropriate text action

string.name: highlight_line_ending_if_two_or_more_spaces
string.value: Highlight spaces at the end of lines containing two or more spaces

string.name: auto_renumber_ordered_list_slowdown
string.value: This option may impact app performance.

string.name: use_different_fonttype_slow_down
string.value: Make use of a different font type. Changing it dynamically impacts app performance.

string.name: archive_does_move_done_tasks
string.value: Move done tasks to specified file in same folder

string.name: start_on_bottom_when_loading_document
string.value: Upon loading a document, position cursor at its end

string.name: character_to_start_items_of_unordered_list_with
string.value: Which character to use to denote unordered lists

string.name: filemanager_doesnot_supply_required_data__appspecific
string.value: Markor can only edit local, offline available documents and does not support file managers that do not provide the full file path.

string.name: file_does_not_exist_and_cant_be_created
string.value: File or directory does not exist and can not be created

string.name: sync_to_local_folder_notice
string.value: Note: Sync apps may place files in custom folders. Open them by changing Markor's document folder accordingly, or in another file manager.

string.name: edit_text_in_center_of_screen
string.value: Edit text in the center of the screen

string.name: do_you_have_a_question_or_problem
string.value: Do you have a question or a problem?

string.name: bug_reports_suggest_improvements
string.value: Give feedback, report bugs or suggest improvements

string.name: help_translating_this_app
string.value: Translate this app into other languages

string.name: contribute_code_to_this_project_anybody_welcome
string.value: Contribute code to the project. Everybody is welcome to do so, including newcomers

string.name: contributors_public_add_yourself_description
string.value: Show contributor info. Provide it to be shown here on an opt-in basis after contributing

string.name: spellcheck_keyboard_suggestion_stay_red_underline_vanishes
string.value: Keyboard suggestions stay, red underline vanishes

string.name: warning_disallowed_sd_access
string.value: Warning! The app doesn't have the permission to save this file, all changes will be lost. There is no possibility to resolve the problem or to confirm something, Android denies any access here.

string.name: error_picture_selection
string.value: No picture selected, taken or saved.

string.name: enable_undo_and_redo_be_patient
string.value: Enable undo and redo actions. Only suited for advanced use, be patient to not delete something important. Close and open editor to clear history.

string.name: enter_yaml_front_matter_attributes_to_show
string.value:
Display entered YAML Front Matter attributes on top at viewed documents. Enter keys separated by commas. Leave empty for none or use '*' for all. 

If any attribute is defined in the document (i.e. title: 'Hello') and there is {{ post.title }} in your document too it is replaced. You can make a custom Front Matter heading this way.

string.name: background_foreground_color_in_editor_works_dark_light
string.value: Changes background and foreground color of the text editor. Adjusts to app theme so available in light and dark theme. Syntax highlighting colors remain the same.

string.name: set_foreground_or_background_color_hexcolor_also_possible
string.value: Set foreground or background color of text? Inserting hex color code is also possible.

string.name: folder_is_created_without_extension
string.value: - Folder is created without file extension

string.name: keep_existing_file
string.value: - Files and folders are not overwritten

string.name: open_new_documents_always_in_new_window
string.value: Open documents always in separate windows. Switch using the 'recents' key of your device.

string.name: get_format_instead_date_or_time
string.value: Get format instead date or time

string.name: tab_to_select_at_start
string.value: Tab to select when starting the app

string.name: swipe_to_change_to_edit_or_view_mode
string.value: Swipe to change to edit or view mode (opposite of the current mode)

string.name: open_the_document_from_main_view
string.value: You can open the document from main view on the bottom, the file browser or the launcher. There is also a option to append text shared into Markor.

string.name: notebook_is_the_home_of_your_files
string.value: Notebook is the folder that Markor loads in the file browser when the app is started. It is the home folder of your files.

string.name: quicknote_is_the_fastest_option_to_write_down_notes
string.value: QuickNote is the fastest option to write down notes. It is a file in Markdown format with default location >Notebook/QuickNote.md<, you can set a custom filepath in the settings.

string.name: todo_is_the_easiest_way_
string.value: Manage your tasks with ToDo. It is a file in todo.txt format with default location >Notebook/todo.txt<, you can set a custom filepath in the settings.

string.name: application_needs_access_to_storage_mount_it
string.value: Permission is required to access this storage. Mount the storage to give access. Confirm this dialog to get a popup. Select the storage there and press select.

string.name: loading_large_file_may_take_a_moment_witharg
string.value: Opening a large file (%s), this may take a moment.

string.name: amount_of_space_for_tab
string.value: Amount of space characters to display tabulator

string.name: selected_file_may_be_a_textfile_want_to_open_in_editor
string.value:
The selected file may be a plaintext file. Do you want to open it in the editor, or in another app?

Do not try to open binary files. If you are not sure, open with other app.

string.name: soft_break_if_not_fit_to_width_else_enable_horizontal_scrolling
string.value: Soft break if text doesn't fit to screen width. Else enable horizontal scrolling.

string.name: always_open_files_with_this_app_when_list_contains_file_extension
string.value: Always open files with this app when the list contains the file extension. Use 'None, .html, .css , .js' for example if you want to edit web files and those without file extension.

string.name: increase_text_size_of_headings_according_to_level
string.value: Increase text size of headers according to level (# h1, ## h2. ### h3…)

string.name: how_much_columns_press_table_button_long_to_start_table
string.value: How many columns? Press table button long to start a table (insert header), press short to add a row.

string.name: create_new_file_or_folder
string.value: Create a new file or folder

string.name: append_human_readable_uuid_to_new_tasks
string.value: Append human readable UUID to new tasks

string.name: no_password_set_cannot_encrypt_decrypt
string.value:
No password set, cannot encrypt or decrypt.
Go to Settings -> General -> Password to set a password.

string.name: could_not_encrypt_file_content_the_file_was_not_saved
string.value: Could not encrypt file content. The file was not saved.

string.name: could_not_decrypt_file_content_wrong_password_or_is_the_file_maybe_not_encrypted
string.value: Could not decrypt file content. Did you use a wrong password? Is the file really encrypted with Markors AES encryption?

string.name: password_already_set_setting_a_new_password_will_overwrite
string.value: Password already set. Setting a new password will overwrite the existing password and you may not be able to access files anymore in case you forget the password.

string.name: add_completion_date_for_todos_when_marking_them_as_done
string.value: Add completion date for todos when marking them as done

string.name: file_description_format_dialog
string.value:
Format for the description under each file in the file browser. Follows Android's SimpleDateFormat rules, with the addition of FS for showing file size. Leave blank to use the default format for your locale.

Example input:
FS yyyy MMM dd hh:mm:ss aa
Output format:
30KB 2020 Mar 20 11:24:52 PM

string.name: import_settings_from_backup_json_file_on_success_the_app_is_restarted
string.value: Import settings from backup json file. On success, the app is restarted.

string.name: failed_to_restore_settings_from_backup
string.value: Failed to restore settings from backup

string.name: do_not_search_specified_files_and_folders
string.value:
Do not search specified files and folders.
Use new line as separator.
Use quotes for exact dir names: "Test".
Or use Regex '^[.].*'
Examples: ^\\..*
"test"
"Test"
.*secret.*
.*BACKUP.*
.*.ini

string.name: enter_space_seperated_contexts_and_projects_these_will
string.value: Enter space-separated @contexts and +projects. These will always be visible at todo.txt insert dialogs.

string.name: search_dynamically_for_notebook_root
string.value: In order to follow wiki links, dynamically search for the notebook.zim file to identify the root directory for the current notebook. Check this if you use multiple zim notebooks or the notebook directory set in the app does not correspond to your zim notebook.

string.name: share_into_format_prefix_for_text_shared
string.value:
Format/Prefix for text shared into Markor. Follows Android's SimpleDateFormat rules.

Use the placeholder {{text}} to position the shared text. If not specified, the shared text is appended and the format used as a prefix.

string.name: attachment_folder_name_desc
string.value: Subfolder under the current folder where attachments will be saved. If left blank, attachments will be saved in the current folder.

string.name: document_error_clip
string.value: Error encountered: Text copied to clipboard.

string.name: wont_save_min_length
string.value: Files with fewer than %d characters not saved automatically in order to prevent data loss.
